title: Scraper Blades with Ceramic Hob Scraper Non-Scratch,100pcs Easy Scraper Blades with Scraper Hobs, Glass Hob Blades, Wall Window Door Cooker Induction Limescale Sticker Remover Paint Cleaning Razor
features: High Quality Material: Our kitchen scraper tool’s body is crafted from premium quality plastic material and blades are made of stainless steel. This scraper wields 100 stainless steel blades, ensuring thorough cleaning without scratches.

Wide Application: With precision design, this razor scraper acts as a powerful sticker remover, effortlessly peeling off floor decals, subfloor wallpaper, and other adhesive materials, leaving surfaces clean and undamaged.

Single Edge Blades: Crafted from premium, flexible ridged steel , the paint scraper blades ensure both safety and longevity. Their sharpness effortlessly eliminates paint, adhesives, and residues from windows, doors, or any coarse surface with ease, offering a durable and effective solution.

Anti- Slip Rubber Body: A must-have addition to your toolkit, this multi-functional floor glow remover an ergonomic design that provides a strong grip for easy and efficient work. It proves to be an effective cleaning tool for glass hobs, windows, and more, enhancing the overall appearance of your spaces.

Push button: Simplify your cleaning tasks with our card scraper's innovative push-button feature, allowing for effortless and convenient removal of grime and residue from your hob's surface. Experience a new level of efficiency in hob maintenance with this user-friendly design.
description: Introducing our versatile solution for all your cleaning challenges – the Ceramic Hob Scraper and Window Scraper. This innovative tool is designed to effortlessly tackle a wide range of tasks, ensuring your surfaces remain pristine while effectively removing unwanted residues. With its arsenal of 100 stainless steel blades, this scraper sets the gold standard for efficient and scratch-free cleaning, making it an indispensable addition to your cleaning routine. When it comes to glass hobs, this scraper takes the spotlight as an essential accessory. Its stainless steel blades work harmoniously to eliminate grime and residues, leaving your hobs sparkling like new. Worried about scratches? Don't be. Our non-scratch plastic construction guarantees that your glass hobs remain unscathed during the cleaning process. Say goodbye to unsightly marks and hello to a gleaming, scratch-free surface. But this scraper's talents don't end at hobs. Its versatility extends to a multitude of surfaces and cleaning challenges. From windows to floors, it adeptly handles the removal of paint, stickers, decals, and labels. No more struggling with stubborn adhesives – this scraper gets the job done efficiently, ensuring that your surfaces are residue-free and ready to shine. The sticker remover function is a standout feature of this tool. Bid farewell to the frustration of sticky residues left behind by stickers and labels. Whether on subfloors or glass, the scraper swiftly lifts away these nuisances, leaving behind a clean and smooth surface. Convenience and effectiveness combine to make sticker removal a breeze. More than just a single-purpose tool, this scraper embodies the concept of multi-purpose cleaning. Its ability to address an array of cleaning tasks, from glass and ceramic surfaces to floor decals, paint smudges, wallpaper labels, and beyond, sets it apart as an invaluable cleaning companion. Streamline your cleaning process and achieve remarkable results
